title: liquidqc fragmentomics output (v1, Phase 0 stub)
description: Per-sample JSON envelope emitted by `liquidqc rna`. Phase 0 covers only the always-present envelope fields; per-metric blocks (fragment_length, end_motifs, soft_clips, periodicity, per_chromosome, panels, sex_inference, snp_fingerprint, saturation, cycle_quality) are added in their owning phases. Companion sparse Parquet (`<sample_id>.per_gene.parquet`) holds Tier-2 + Tier-3 per-gene rows.

schema_version.description: Semver for this schema. `0.1.0-stub` until per-metric blocks land.

git_commit.description: Short git hash of the liquidqc build (or `unknown` for non-git builds).

sample_id.description: Sample identifier. Defaults to BAM basename without extension; overridable via `--sample-id`.

bam_path.description: Absolute path to the input BAM as supplied at run time.

bam_md5.description: MD5 of the BAM file bytes.

bam_size_bytes.description: Size of the BAM file in bytes.

gtf_path.description: Absolute path to the GTF annotation as supplied at run time.

reference_fasta_md5.description: MD5 of the reference FASTA. Null if `--fasta` was not supplied (some QC features unavailable).

library_prep.description: Free-text library prep label from `--library-prep`. Never silently defaulted; missing value is a hard error at the CLI layer. Used downstream to stratify cross-cohort analyses and to auto-flag tagmentation-driven end-motif bias.

paired_end.description: True if the BAM contains paired-end reads (auto-detected unless overridden via `--paired-end true|false`).

read_length_max.description: Maximum observed read length in this BAM.

read_length_mean.description: Mean observed read length in this BAM.

read_count_total.description: Total number of read records in the BAM (primary + secondary + supplementary + unmapped).

read_count_after_filters.description: Read count after `filters` (MAPQ, primary-only, proper-pair where requested) is applied.

filters.description: Filter parameters actually applied to this run. Keys are stable across schema versions; new keys may be added.

require_proper_pair.description: If true, only proper-pair reads (SAM flag 0x2) are counted toward QC and fragmentomics.

drop_secondary.description: If true, secondary alignments (SAM flag 0x100) are excluded.

drop_supplementary.description: If true, supplementary alignments (SAM flag 0x800) are excluded.

drop_duplicates.description: If true, reads flagged as duplicate (SAM flag 0x400) are excluded. cfRNA defaults to false because biological duplication is ~80%.

qc_flags.description: Auto-generated QC flags. The flag set evolves with the schema; current names are documented inline. Unknown values may appear in future schema versions.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds for the full liquidqc run on this BAM.

peak_rss_mb.description: Peak resident set size in MiB observed during the run.
